inventory.note: No canonical Inventory domain exists in zero-main yet (Inventory migration 700100 adds tables but no InventoryItem model path confirmed). VehicleStock is scoped to vehicle-onboard stock and does not duplicate warehouse inventory.

stock_consumption.note: VehicleStock.consume() tracks on-site consumption. No existing equivalent in zero-main.

service_job_stock_readiness.note: ServiceJob.vehicleStockAvailable() computes stock readiness using VehicleStock query

odoo_concepts_ported.stock.quant on vehicle: vehicle_stock table with quantity / quantity_reserved / quantity_consumed

odoo_concepts_discarded: Odoo product.product links (no product catalog in zero-main yet)
safe_to_extend_later: Link VehicleStock.sku to a future ProductCatalog model
Hook VehicleStock.consume() into Inventory StockMovement when Inventory domain matures
